list_prices.description: Fetch prices for a given plan

update_price.description: Update promo discount percent for a price entry

get_plan.description: Get a single plan by ID. Returns full plan object including name, description, imageUrl, enabled, hidden, labels, tags, priority, subCount.

list_my_subscriptions.description: List your own subscriptions as a customer (plans you are subscribed to). Paginated. Returns planId, priceId, planName, priceName, startDate, expireDate, expired, subscriptionPeriod, purchasePrice.

list_plugin_repos.description: List all plugin repositories for your developer account. Returns array of {id, url, developer}. Can filter by ?developer=655.

get_plugin_repo.description: Get a single plugin repository by ID. Returns {id, url, developer}. e.g. id=73 → achachi/storm2plugins, id=112 → AchachiSoftware/storm2plugins.

list_plugins_by_repo.description: List all plugins in a given repository. Returns paginated content with {id, name, description, version, hash, developer}.

get_plugin.description: Get a single plugin by ID. Returns {id, name, description, version, hash, developer}.

list_plugin_links_by_price.description: List all plugins linked to a price. Returns [{id, priceId, pluginId, name, description, sessionLimit, repoUrl}]. This shows which plugins are included with a given price tier.

create_plugin_link.description: Link a plugin to a price. POST body likely contains priceId and pluginId.

delete_plugin_link.description: Remove a plugin from a price by deleting the link entry. linkId is the id field from list_plugin_links_by_price.

delete_plugin.description: Delete a plugin by ID from the plugin repository. Use with caution.
